Package org.mitre.synthea.engine

Class ExpressedConditionRecord.ConditionWithSymptoms

java.lang.Object
org.mitre.synthea.engine.ExpressedConditionRecord.ConditionWithSymptoms
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Cloneable
Enclosing class:
ExpressedConditionRecord
public class ExpressedConditionRecord.ConditionWithSymptoms extends Object implements Cloneable, Serializable
Represents a condition with its associated symptoms.

  • Constructor Details

    • ConditionWithSymptoms

      public ConditionWithSymptoms(String name, Long onsetTime, Long endTime)
      Create a new instance for the supplied condition name, onset and end times.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the condition
      onsetTime - the time the condition started
      endTime - the time the condition ended

    • addSymptoms

      public void addSymptoms(String name, ExpressedSymptom.SymptomSource symptomSource)
      Record a symptom for the supplied module.
      Parameters:
      name - symptom name.
      symptomSource - module origin of the symptom.

      public Long getOnsetTime()
      Get the onset time of the condition.

      the onset time of the condition

    • getConditionName

      Get the name of the condition.

      the name of the condition

    • getSymptoms

      public Map<String,List<Integer>> getSymptoms()
      Get the symptoms associated with the condition.
      Returns:
      a map of symptoms and their associated values during the condition
